title: Audizio FMB60 TV Wall Mount with Swivel & Tilt, Full Motion Adjustable TV Bracket for 32-65" Screens, Max 40kg, VESA 200-400, Cable Management, Built-in Levelling, Black

features: Flexible Viewing: Audizio FMB60 TV wall mount has dual swivelling arms, providing up to 120 degrees of rotation, letting you easily adjust your TV angle to find the perfect viewing position every time.
Space-Saving Design: Featuring full motion extending from 53mm up to 464mm, this TV bracket conveniently folds flat against the wall when not in use, keeping the room sleek and uncluttered.
VESA Compatibility: This sturdy TV wall bracket supports VESA mounting standards 200x200 to 400x400mm, fitting most flat and curved TVs from reputable brands measuring between 32 and 65 inches.
Stable and Secure: Rated to hold TV screens weighing up to 40kg, with built-in level adjustment (+/-3 degrees) and robust construction, guaranteeing your TV stays safely installed at all times.
Integrated Cable Management: Designed with convenient cable management channels, neatly organise wires to maintain a tidy look behind your TV while preventing accidental damages over time.
description: Bring comfort and convenience into your TV viewing with the Audizio FMB60 full motion TV wall mount. Ideal for diverse spaces like living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens or offices, it allows flexible positioning and easy adjustments on TVs sized between 32 and 65 inches. Installation is straightforward, thanks to the step-by-step manual included alongside all necessary mounting accessories. Swivel arms allow up to 120-degree rotation, easily achieving your desired viewing angle or reducing glare from windows and lighting. Tilt adjustments (-15 to +5 degrees) mean your screen angle can be perfected for maximum comfort, ideal when mounted higher up or at eye level. Built solidly to guarantee safety and longevity, the Audizio FMB60 offers universal compatibility, fitting screens weighing up to 40kg across various brands. Recognised VESA industry standards are supported-from 200x200mm to the larger 400x400mm, so you're confident knowing your TV bracket seamlessly accommodates your set. Neatly designed cable channels help arrange cables out of sight, minimising clutter around your television area and protecting wires from potential wear or damage. Its sleek black design complements any home decor, blending effortlessly into the background for a streamlined and organised look.
